channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: She was very ”skillful’: Veteran Ecocash thief jailed after she stole over US$11,000 across Zimbabwe
item.description: A defiant Harare woman has been sentenced to prison after pleading guilty to a sophisticated string of fraud and theft offences involving more than US$11,000. The scheme, which targeted both corporate entities and individual vendors, involved the use of manipulated EcoCash transaction messages and the brazen theft of EcoCash agent SIM cards to withdraw large [...] The post She was very ”skillful’: Veteran Ecocash thief jailed after she stole over US$11,000 across Zimbabwe first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: ’SADC must open skies and embrace AI to build climate‐resilient future,’ Mhona @bulawayo24
item.description: BULAWAYO –- Transport and Infrastructural Development Minister Felix Mhona has urged SADC member states to liberalise air services and invest in AI‐enabled, climate‐resilient infrastructure, saying th... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.dc:creator: Global Edition

item.title: Nurses demand urgent action at Ngomahuru Psychiatric Hospital after patient dies following escape
item.description: THE Zimbabwe Nurses Association (ZINA) has called on the government to urgently address deteriorating infrastructure and security at Ngomahuru Psychiatric Hospital in Masvingo following the death of a mentally ill patient who escaped from the facility. Beatrice Murera was found dead in the Tugwi River after escaping from the psychiatric hospital on June 16 through [...] The post Nurses demand urgent action at Ngomahuru Psychiatric Hospital after patient dies following escape appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Jared Boka’s family launches petition for national child safety framework after Falcon College drowning
item.description: THE family of late Falcon College pupil Jared Boka has launched an online petition calling for the establishment of a National Child Safeguarding and School Safety Framework in Zimbabwe following his drowning in March. The petition, launched on Wednesday by Samantha N. Boka, urges the government to introduce mandatory national child protection and safety standards [...] The post Jared Boka’s family launches petition for national child safety framework after Falcon College drowning appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Latest research flags Zimbabwe’s human rights record again
item.description: NEW data has flagged Zimbabwe’s human rights record, highlighting gaps in basic rights such as housing, food and emphasising how people do not feel safe from state abuse. The latest research, conducted by Human Rights Measurement Initiative (HRMI) an independent non-governmental organisation (NGO), scores Zimbabwe’s right to housing at 33.5% amid recent demolitions in southern [...] The post Latest research flags Zimbabwe’s human rights record again appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabwean tycoon Strive Masiyiwa joins the board of advisors of Laurel Strategies, the global CEO advisory firm
item.description: Billionaires Africa Strive Masiyiwa, the Zimbabwean billionaire founder of Econet Group and one of Africa’s most globally connected business figures, has joined the board of advisors of Laurel Strategies, the global CEO advisory firm that counsels senior executives of Fortune 500 companies on strategy, crisis management, reputation and governance, in a role that extends his [...] The post Zimbabwean tycoon Strive Masiyiwa joins the board of advisors of Laurel Strategies, the global CEO advisory firm appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.description: Businessman and socialite Wicknell Chivayo has defended claims about the value of his luxury Clifton property in Cape Town, dismissing accusations that he exaggerated the cost of the mansion.In a stro... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews

item.title: ZiG monthly inflation rises to 0.6% @bulawayo24
item.description: THE monthly inflation rate for Zimbabwe Gold (ZiG) rose to 0.6% in June 2026 from 0.5% recorded in May, according to the latest figures released by Zimbabwe National Statistics Agency (ZimStat).The la... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Quiet Money, Deep Roots: How the Oak Foundation Backs Zimbabwe’s Communities
item.description: The Geneva-based Oak Foundation has funded Zimbabwean causes since 1983. In 2025 its Zimbabwe programme made USD 7.9 million in grants, backing palliative care, landmine clearance, regenerative farming and care for children who have lost parents. #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Tapiwa Hillary Phillipo
